Priti Patel MP Visits Honywood School To Discuss The School's Plans For The Future

Wednesday, 29 April, 2026
Priti Patel, Member of Parliament for Witham, recently visited Honywood School to meet Headteacher Mr Saunders and see first-hand the work being done to support pupils’ learning and development. The visit provided an opportunity to celebrate the school’s recent successes, including its student production of Grease , and to discuss wider upcoming projects. With the GCSE examination period...
